name: Date Tapioca
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg yolk.
2. Mix in a saucepan with milk, tapioca, and salt. Cook over medium heat for 5 minutes.
3. Beat egg white until stiff. Set aside.
4. Bring the tapioca mixture to a boil. Add dates and cook, stirring constantly for 6 to 8 minutes or until thick.
5. Remove from heat. Stir in vanilla.
6. Cool at room temperature, stirring occasionally.
7. Refrigerate until chilled.
1/2 cup serving - 155 calories, 2 Starch/Bread exchange, 6.2 gm protein, 1.7 gm fat, 30.1 gm carbohydrate, 145.8 mg sodium, 384.8 mg potassium, 2.2 gm fiber, 70 mg cholesterol.
Source: Am. Diabetes Assoc. Family Cookbook Vol 1, 1987
Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93
